summary: Session 1: Lightweight legibility shipped per D1/D2 — parseSessionSetConfig gained enum-validated verificationMode parsing (with a verifier-driven fix accepting quoted YAML scalars across uatScope/tier/verificationMode); new pure module src/utils/tierLegibility.ts implements the D1 shouldRenderPlusFraction predicate + hasTypedVerificationSession + D1 fraction tooltip + D2 'lw' marker helpers; readSessionSets derives an in-memory plusFraction; fractionFor renders the N/M+ suffix; RowPayload carries fractionTooltip/tierMarker/tierTooltip; client.js renders the tier marker span and fraction title; tree.css styles .row-tier-marker per the Set 050 asterisk pattern. Tests: tierLegibility.test.ts (config matrix incl. quoted values, D1 predicate matrix before/after a typed verification session, D2 markers, readSessionSets disk fixtures). TS suite 724 pass + 2 pre-existing Set 026 failures; Python 1185 pass / 1 skip; esbuild clean. Verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major, quoted-enum parsing) fixed in flight; R2 gpt-5-4 VERIFIED.

reason.specifics: Routed ai-assignment analysis (gemini-pro) recommends the same Anthropic orchestrator for Session 2: it is a structurally similar multi-layer Explorer change (derivation -> protocol -> webview rendering) where continuity of the Set 050 marker pattern context helps.
